## Summary

Brief description of what this PR introduces or changes. Focus on the "why" rather than the "what" (the diff shows what changed).

## Changes

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Testing

How has this been tested or validated?

- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Edge cases considered

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are atomic and have clear messages
- [ ] Code follows project guidelines (see CODING_GUIDELINES.md)
- [ ] No unnecessary changes or refactoring unrelated to this PR
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (linting, type-checking)
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation if applicable

## Related Issues

Fixes #(issue)
Relates to #(issue)
